title: callicarpa pilosissima
intro: Callicarpa pilosissima, also known as the hairy purple fringe flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa pilosissima include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Callicarpa pilosissima can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
